name: the red-team lens simulates model/IP extraction and misuse paths (EO Sec. 3 pre-release red-teaming)
command: printf 'resource x {}\n' > a.tf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit md 2>/dev/null | grep -qiE 'extraction|misuse' && echo w13-attacker-lens 1>&2
